name: CyberPower Intelligent LCD 1000VA/600W Mini-Tower UPS System - Simulated Sine Wave - 10x NEMA 5-15R - Line Interactive - 2x USB-A Charging Ports (2.1A shared) - RG6 Coax Protection - RJ45 Network Protection - USB & Serial Management Ports (BRG1000AVRLCD)
shortName: CyberPower Intelligent LCD 1000VA/600W Mini-Tower UPS System
description: A 1000VA/600W line-interactive UPS system with LCD display designed for small office and home office protection with simulated sine wave output.
